data.title: Books-A-Million customers and booksellers raised $2.9 million and collected 214,732 books/toys nationwide for holiday drives.
data.description: In Birmingham, Alabama on December 24, 2025, customers and booksellers at Books-A-Million united during the festive period to make a significant charitable impact. Across the nation, Books-A-Million stores amassed 214,732 donated books and toys, along with close to $2.9 million in contributions.

data.title: Holiday spending rises 4.2% year-over-year despite inflation, with technology and personal goods leading. Retailers benefiting.
data.description: Retail companies such as Amazon.com Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN), Walmart Inc. (NASDAQ: WMT), and Target Corp. (NYSE: TGT) are attracting increased investor attention as early signs indicate that the 2025 holiday shopping season is more robust than anticipated. Despite concerns about inflation and economic instability, U.S. consumers displayed remarkable resilience by boosting retail spending by 4.2% year-over-year. According to preliminary data released on Tuesday by Visa Consulting and Analytics, consumer spending remained firm over a seven-week period starting from November 1, excluding automobile, gasoline, and restaurant purchases. Visa Inc. (NYSE: V) observed a steady increase in spending, especially in technology and personal goods categories, although the figures are not adjusted for inflation. The analysis highlights the dominance of in-store shopping, with online sales contributing significantly to the growth. Retailers are adapting to changing consumer behavior influenced by artificial intelligence technologies. Amazon, in particular, maintained its momentum with plans to employ 250,000 seasonal workers during the holiday period. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: FCC bans Chinese drones, boosting US drone industry. China's DJI faced ban as FCC blocks foreign manufacturers. Domestic drone stocks soar.
data.description: The U.S. drone industry received a significant boost when the Federal Communications Commission (FCC) banned foreign-made uncrewed aircraft systems (UAS) and their critical components, including Chinese drone makers DJI and Autel, from being sold in the country. This decision came after a national security determination on Monday, with the FCC adding these items to its "Covered List." While current drone fleets are still operational, the ban has created a void in the market previously dominated by DJI, which held a market share of nearly 70-80%. This move has led to a surge in domestic drone stocks, and investors are closely monitoring the situation.

data.title: Pudgy Penguins now grace the Las Vegas Sphere following Dogwifhat's failure, showcasing their crypto art.
data.description: The Las Vegas Sphere now features the popular cartoon characters from the crypto-native brand Pudgy Penguins. This unique collaboration has transformed the iconic structure with the beloved creatures. The eye-catching display has garnered attention from locals and tourists alike, with thousands of people stopping by to admire the colorful and whimsical artwork. The partnership between the Las Vegas Sphere and Pudgy Penguins has brought a surge of visitors to the area, with foot traffic increasing by an impressive 30% since the installation of the cartoon creatures. This successful collaboration highlights the growing influence of digital brands in the physical world and the power of merging art with technology to create captivating experiences.

data.title: Freddie Mac reports 30-year fixed-rate mortgage averages 6.18% in latest survey, down for Christmas holiday.
data.description: Freddie Mac, based in McLean, Virginia, reported on December 24, 2025, that the average rate for a 30-year fixed-rate mortgage stood at 6.18% according to its Primary Mortgage Market Survey ® (PMMS ® ).

data.title: Propane essential in Texas during holidays, keeping homes and businesses running smoothly.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, on December 24, 2025, amidst the peak of the holiday season, propane emerges as a vital component in maintaining comfort levels in homes, sustaining business operations, and facilitating essential holiday services throughout the state. Despite being mostly invisible to consumers, propane stands as a key resource in ensuring the functionality and comfort during this festive period.

data.title: SHIB price down 60% in 2025; reaching $1 would need $589 trillion market cap, impossible with 589 trillion tokens in circulation.
data.description: The value of Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) has plummeted by 60% in 2025, dashing hopes of reaching $1 or $0.01. Achieving these values would necessitate an astronomical $589 trillion market cap, six times greater than the entire global GDP. With 589 trillion tokens in circulation, Shiba Inu far exceeds the supply of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) at 21 million and Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) at 120 million. Should SHIB hit $1, its market capitalization would surge to $589 trillion, surpassing Nvidia's value of $4.4 trillion by over 130 times and eclipsing the combined market cap of all 500 S&P 500 companies at $57 trillion by 10-fold. Even a more modest target of $0.01 for SHIB would necessitate... Further details are accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Geekvape reaches Mount Everest summit for its 10th anniversary after 2-week ascent. Test of endurance and discipline.
data.description: Geekvape, based in Shenzhen, China, recently commemorated its 10th anniversary by successfully reaching the peak of Mount Everest. The achievement followed rigorous preparation, training, and a challenging two-week climb. This significant milestone not only symbolized the company's endurance and discipline but also highlighted its commitment to core values. The preparations included route planning, environmental evaluations, and intense physical conditioning. The expedition was a testament to Geekvape's dedication to respecting challenges, mirroring the reverence shown towards the iconic Mount Everest.

data.title: Global label printing market forecasted for 2025-2032 sees rapid transformation due to new regulations, tech advancements, and sustainability pressures. Organisations urged to adopt forward-thinking labeling strategies. Compliance, supply chain, and traceability are key focus areas.
data.description: A recent report titled "Label Printing Market - Global Forecast 2025-2032" has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. The global label printing market is experiencing significant changes due to new regulatory requirements, technological progress, and increasing focus on sustainability. By implementing forward-thinking labeling approaches, senior executives can effectively manage compliance challenges, adapt to changes in supply chains, and address the increasing demand for enhanced transparency.

data.title: Z.ai released GLM-4.7, a new large language model for development workflows, tailored for longer task cycles.
data.description: Singapore-based company Z.ai has recently launched GLM-4.7, the newest version of its GLM large language model series, just before Christmas. The release is designed to cater to the growing demand for open-source models that can manage extended tasks in production settings. GLM-4.7 deviates from previous models that were primarily used for short interactions, as it is now specifically tailored for development environments requiring prolonged task cycles. This iteration aims to enhance efficiency and support frequent tool usage.

data.title: Halper Sadeh LLC urges Danaher Corporation shareholders to discuss their rights, contact firm to enforce rights.
data.description: In New York on December 24, 2025, Halper Sadeh LLC, an investor rights law firm, announced an investigation into potential breaches by specific officers and directors of Danaher Corporation (NYSE: DHR). Shareholders are urged to promptly contact the firm to take necessary actions within a limited timeframe to protect their rights. For more information, reach out to Halper Sadeh LLC immediately.

data.title: Dow up, Nike gains on Apple CEO stake, jobless claims drop, Nvidia enters; live coverage. Dow Jones wavers Wednesday.
data.description: Today in the stock market, the Dow Jones index showed fluctuations following an unexpected decrease in jobless claims. Meanwhile, Nvidia stock saw gains and reached a new entry point on Tuesday. The Dow experienced an increase as Nike surged due to news of Apple's CEO acquiring a stake in the company. data.title: Sable Offshore Corp. receives emergency special permit from PHMSA for Santa Ynez Pipeline System segments in Houston.
data.description: Houston-based company, Sable Offshore Corp., has recently been granted a special emergency permit from the Pipeline and Hazardous Materials Safety Administration (PHMSA) for certain segments of their Santa Ynez Pipeline System. This permit allows for immediate action in addressing any safety concerns related to the pipeline system.
